subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I have perused the letter thou didst write to His honour Haji Siyyid Javad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله مکتوبی که بجناب حاجی سید جواد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
